category_sources: source_facts.description says librcsc is a RoboCup Soccer Simulator library; official repository says it is a base library for simulated soccer teams and tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is librcsc; official helios-base/librcsc repository README names Librcsc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents quick start, configuration, environment variables, and generated documentation instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/helios-base/librcsc, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names RoboCup Soccer Simulator; official README describes simulated soccer team development and related tools.
